scripts.format: prettier --check src components.json eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts package.json postcss.config.mjs tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:code && pnpm run lint:type
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.release:dev: pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build --config ../../infra/apps/web/wrangler.jsonc && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config ../../infra/apps/web/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.release: pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build --config ../../infra/apps/web/wrangler.jsonc && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config ../../infra/apps/web/wrangler.jsonc
